title: Wake Up Call
summary: Nova wakes for another shift in the Pit and reports to Jed before the colony day starts.
description: Learn the basics of moving through the Homestead, get your bearings, find Jed, and get your gear ready for another quota run.
flavor: For Nova, survival starts before breakfast.

stages.title: Wake in the Pit
stages.description: Get your bearings in Nova's bunk and leave the sleeping level.

tasks.text: Find your way out of the Pit sleeping level.

stages.title: Report to Jed
stages.description: Find Jed in the Pit, then follow his directions to the Workshop.

tasks.text: Talk to Jed about the shift.
Receive your starter gear from Jed.

title: Paperwork
summary: Nova reports for mine shift clearance, but the checkpoint finds something worse than a missing form.
description: Report for shift clearance at the Transit Checkpoint, meet Zeke at the Admin window, and survive the Dominion math that marked Nova for recycling.
flavor: The system does not hate you. It calculated you.

stages.title: Report for Shift Clearance
stages.description: Dominion makes every worker pass through the Transit Checkpoint before entering the mine.

tasks.text: Report to the Transit Checkpoint for mine shift clearance.
Request mine clearance at the booth.

stages.title: Override the Flag
stages.description: Zeke finds Nova's mandatory retirement order and tries to bury it in the paperwork.

tasks.text: Talk to Zeke at the Admin window.
Let Zeke bury the liability flag under grid-instability paperwork.
Take the Mine Access Badge from Zeke.

title: The Echo
summary: Boggs sends Nova to Sector 4 to clear interference, but the signal is older than Dominion.
description: Enter the Logistics Sector, descend into the Deep Mine, fight through Sector 4, and find the source of the impossible hum.
flavor: The mine was never quiet. Nova just had not heard what was underneath.

stages.title: Sector 4 Assignment
stages.description: Boggs turns Nova's breaker surge into punishment duty.

tasks.text: Get the Sector 4 assignment from Foreman Boggs.
Use the Mine Access Badge at the Deep Elevator.

stages.title: Deep Mine Descent
stages.description: Restore the mine lights, push through the old tunnels, and use Guard Break against shielded enemies.

tasks.text: Restore power at the Cavern Junction support pillar.
Clear the first Deep Mine encounter.
Defeat a shielded Acoustic Bulwark by using Guard Break or Stagger.
Reach the Architect threshold below Sector 4.

stages.title: The Tuning Fork
stages.description: The interference is a relic signal, and touching it changes Nova.

tasks.text: Survive the Source sync and recover the relic.

title: Red Alert
summary: The relic trips the lockdown and the colony Nova knew turns hostile.
description: Escape the Deep Mine under lockdown, follow Zeke's comm guidance, and reach the Cargo Lift before the Warden's security teams close in.
flavor: The system stopped ignoring Nova. That was worse.

stages.title: Escape the Lockdown
stages.description: The Warden seals the sector after Nova syncs with the relic.

tasks.text: Follow Zeke's comm instructions through the escape route.

stages.title: Cargo Lift
stages.description: Jed catches up at the lift with one last piece of impossible scrap.

title: The Launch
summary: Nova and Zeke hijack a cargo pod, but the sky is another wall.
description: Fight to the Pod Bay, defeat the Warden, splice the Chime into the pod core, and launch into the crash that ends Nova's old life.
flavor: Escaping the colony is not the same thing as escaping the planet.

stages.title: Reach the Pod Bay
stages.description: Security is collapsing toward the launch rail.

stages.title: Defeat the Warden
stages.description: The Warden blocks the pod and forces Nova to prove what she learned in the mines.

stages.title: Launch
stages.description: The Chime wakes the pod core, but the auto-nav locks onto an unknown signal.

tasks.text: Splice the Chime into the pod core.
Hit the Planetary Shield and crash toward Sector 9.

title: The Scavenger's Stash
summary: Scrapper knows where a failed rebel cache is hidden, but paranoia keeps him from fetching it.
description: Follow Scrapper's lead through Trade Row, find the old cache, and recover the explosives the last resistance cell never got to use.
flavor: The people who hid the stash are gone. Their warning still has teeth.

stages.title: Follow Scrapper's Tip
stages.description: Scrapper has a lead on a hidden cache from a failed rebel operation.

tasks.text: Talk to Scrapper in Trade Row.

stages.title: Return to Scrapper
stages.description: Bring the cache proof back before Scrapper loses his nerve.

title: System Flush
summary: Doc's med-bay vents are backing up with toxic fumes because Dominion keeps denying repairs.
description: Clear the contaminated ventilation route, stop the fumes from poisoning the med-bay, and collect Doc's corrosive round mod.
flavor: Dominion does not fix what it can replace.

stages.title: Clear the Vents
stages.description: Doc needs the med-bay vents cleared before more patients start coughing blood.

tasks.text: Talk to Doc in the Med-Bay.

stages.title: Report to Doc
stages.description: Doc can finally breathe long enough to pay you.

title: Heavy Lifting
summary: Boggs needs cargo moved and cares more about the shipment clock than the workers trapped behind it.
description: Use a loader to clear the collapsed cargo route, save the trapped workers, and learn why shielded enemies need to be broken before they can be hurt.
flavor: Boggs calls it labor efficiency. Nova calls it not letting people die under a crate.

stages.title: Clear the Cargo Collapse
stages.description: A cargo collapse is blocking the loading route, and Boggs wants it fixed now.

tasks.text: Talk to Foreman Boggs about the blocked route.

stages.title: Break the Guard
stages.description: The loader route becomes a controlled lesson in breaking a shield before attacking.

tasks.text: Use Guard Break or Stagger against a shielded target.
Clear the final debris and free the trapped workers.

title: Protocol Override
summary: A hacked terminal in the Server Room still carries code from a resistance cell that failed.
description: Find the old rebel terminal, restore its protocol spoof, and leave with admin access that can shave time off future security work.
flavor: If you are reading this, we failed. But the code still works.

stages.title: Find the Terminal
stages.description: The Server Room hides old code Dominion never fully scrubbed.

title: The Lost Shift
summary: A dead miner's datapad proves the colony stopped being employment long before Nova noticed.
description: Track the missing shift through the Deep Mine, recover the datapad, and learn what Dominion does when workers stop producing.
flavor: They were not paying us anymore. They were just keeping us.

stages.title: Trace the Missing Shift
stages.description: A collapsed side route holds the last record of a crew nobody rescued.

tasks.text: Find the collapsed tunnel in the Deep Mine.

title: A Strange Coast
summary: The pod crashed in the overgrown ruins of Sector 9. Establish a foothold and find a way forward.
description: Examine the wreckage, check on Zeke, and explore the surrounding overgrown area of Sector 9.
flavor: The air smells of ozone and crushed green ferns. The metal hull is cold.

stages.title: Assess the Crash
stages.description: Find your bearings after the crash in Sector 9.

tasks.text: Talk to Zeke at the pod wreckage.
Follow the glow-water stream into the ruins.

title: The Signal
summary: Follow the distress beacon's frequency through the jungle ruins to find its source.
description: Follow the signal pulse through the dangerous Razor-Vine path and find a way through the Temple Gate.
flavor: A clean frequency in a world of static.

stages.title: The Sanctuary Threshold
stages.description: Reach the massive Temple Gate blocking the path deeper into the ruins.

tasks.text: Clear the hostile paths through the canopy.
Slot the Chime into the Temple Gate's resonator.

title: Sleeping Giant
summary: Waking Orion from stasis requires bypassing stasis safety alignment protocols.
description: Enter the Sanctuary facility, explore the Hall of Echoes, locate Orion's stasis chamber, and solve the alignment lock.
flavor: Twenty years of sleep, waiting for a chord that never came.

stages.title: Ancient Geometry
stages.description: Examine the shifting murals in the Hall of Echoes to unlock the facility route.

tasks.text: Examine the shifting light murals in the Hall of Echoes.

stages.title: Awaken the Tuner
stages.description: Align the stasis pod energy rings to awaken Orion.

tasks.text: Solve the stasis pod ring alignment code.

title: The Hunter
summary: A Dominion stalker is tracking the crew. Confront them before they strike.
description: Travel to Canopy Ridge to scout the hunter, confront the assassin Gh0st, and survive the apex beast ambush.
flavor: He has a code, but the armor wears the orders.

stages.title: Confrontation
stages.description: Travel to the high Canopy Ridge and deal with the stalker.

tasks.text: Travel to the wind-swept Canopy Ridge.
Confront the hunter waiting in the shadows.

title: Liftoff
summary: Repair the Astra to cross the phase curtain and reach the Spire.
description: Find parts to repair the Astra, configure the Bridge Relic, and launch into the sky.
flavor: A vessel of old songs, ready to fly again.

stages.title: Rebuild the Circuit
stages.description: Bypass the energy gate, gather pod parts, and boot the Astra.

tasks.text: Deactivate the Source Gate energy barrier.
Recover power conduits from the pod wreckage.
Reroute the Chime on the Astra bridge.

title: Botanist
summary: Zeke wants to scan 5 unique plants to make sense of the local environment.
description: Find and scan unique flora in Sector 9.
flavor: Cataloging the weeds to forget the bugs.

stages.title: Ecological Scan
stages.description: Find and scan unique plant specimens.

tasks.text: Scan the giant crystalline ferns in the canopy.
Scan the bioluminescent weeds near the stream.
Scan the moss clinging to the pod wreckage.
Scan the razor-vine spores in the path.
Scan the ancient roots in the stasis chamber.

title: Lost Patrol
summary: Trace a lost patrol through three distress signatures, recover its transceiver, and salvage its Thermal Cutter.
description: Locate the logs of a lost squad in the Sector 9 ruins.
flavor: Steel rusts faster than bones here.

stages.title: Broken Signals
stages.description: Triangulate the scattered patrol signatures.

tasks.text: Trace the beacon in the wilds thickets.
Decode the beacon in the patrol hollow.
Confirm the signal from the ridge perch.

stages.title: Dominion Downfall
stages.description: Follow the combined vector to the patrol cache.

tasks.text: Recover the encrypted transceiver and Thermal Cutter.

title: Tideglass Day
summary: Orion suggests collecting glowing tideglass skewers from the beach for a hot meal.
description: Visit Tideglass Beach and gather glowing tideglass skewers.
flavor: Sometimes a hot meal is the only shield you have left.

stages.title: A Breather by the Waves
stages.description: Gather tideglass skewers from the glowing shore.

title: Ancient Echoes
summary: Retrieve three wing crystals and use their harmonics to align the stasis chamber murals.
description: Calibrate the light-murals to hear their full song.
flavor: The stones remember when the choir was whole.

stages.title: Scattered Chorus
stages.description: Recover resonance crystals from the Sanctuary wings.

tasks.text: Retrieve the western wing resonance crystal.
Retrieve the eastern wing resonance crystal.
Retrieve the acoustics lab resonance crystal.

stages.title: Chorus Tuning
stages.description: Seat the crystals and restore the stasis mural chord.

tasks.text: Align the stasis chamber mural frequency to C#m7.

title: Stolen Tech
summary: Infiltrate the guarded maintenance vents, hack their security grid, and recover the stolen transmitter.
description: Scavenge the maintenance vents for the transmitter.
flavor: It's not stealing if they're all dead.

stages.title: Silent Frequency
stages.description: Defeat the vent security without alerting the facility.

tasks.text: Slip past the guard-system scan pattern.

stages.title: Ventilation Scramble
stages.description: Reach the tech alcove beyond the grid.

title: Homecoming
summary: Land the Astra and secure a hidden base of operations in the lower city sewers.
description: Avoid Dominion surveillance by landing in the sewers, clear the landing zone of local hostiles, and let Zeke lead you to his old apartment safehouse.
flavor: Returning to a home that forgot you ever existed.

stages.title: Securing the Sewers
stages.description: Clear the sewers of local security and set up a landing site.

tasks.text: Clear local hostile forces at the landing pad.
Follow the run-off tunnels up to the Vent Output.

stages.title: Zeke's Safehouse
stages.description: Locate Zeke's old apartment and set up a base.

tasks.text: Locate Zeke's apartment inside The Static block.
Wait for Orion to set up a Source Shield in the apartment.

title: The Plan
summary: Gather intel from the lower city to plan a heist into the Upper City.
description: Talk to the bartender Jax, scan Dominion databases with Gh0st, hack Spire elevator blueprints, and coordinate at the safehouse planning table.
flavor: Every lock has a chord. You just have to find the keys.

stages.title: Intelligence Gathering
stages.description: Search for info on Spire security and elevator passcodes.

tasks.text: Talk to Jax at The Static bar.
Search security databases in the plaza.
Hack Spire elevator blueprints at Zeke's workstation.

stages.title: The Assembly
stages.description: Assemble at the planning table to coordinate the heist.

tasks.text: Examine the planning table to coordinate.

title: Neon Fix
summary: Help Jax repair his bar's flickering neon sign to keep Dominion security away.
description: Inspect the flickering sign at The Static and install a replacement neon sign core.
flavor: In the Lower City, darkness is a shield. Neon is just advertisement.

stages.title: Sign Repair
stages.description: Replace the neon sign's burnt core.

tasks.text: Inspect the flickering sign outside The Static.
Install the replacement neon sign core.

title: Cold Case
summary: Help Gh0st search Spire security databases for records on his sister Elara.
description: Examine terminal records in the Transit Plaza to find clues about Elara.
flavor: A name is just data, until it becomes a song you can't stop humming.

stages.title: Database Breach
stages.description: Search Dominion security databases in the plaza.

tasks.text: Search terminal records at Transit Plaza.

title: Night Market Run
summary: Help Mika repair the Night Market's string lanterns under patrol pressure.
description: Search the alleyways and fix the flickering lanterns to light up the market.
flavor: Light doesn't just show the way; it shows we are still here.

stages.title: Lighting the Market
stages.description: Fix the flickering market lanterns.

tasks.text: Fix the flickering lanterns in the Night Market.

title: Social Engineering
summary: Infiltrate the Upper City and pass the penthouse scanners by splitting the crew.
description: Blend in at the Skypark, let Zeke and Orion disable the sensor grid from Laundry Service, and send Nova and Gh0st through the lobby in disguise.
flavor: The cleanest rooms hide the dirtiest locks.

stages.title: Guest Access
stages.description: Create a believable path into the penthouse.

tasks.text: Blend in at the Skypark and acquire guest access.
Have Zeke and Orion disable the scanner grid from Laundry Service.

stages.title: Pass the Scanners
stages.description: Move Nova and Gh0st through the lobby while security is blind.

tasks.text: Enter the penthouse lobby in disguise.

title: The Lens
summary: Enter the Archive, solve the light puzzle, and steal the Lens relic.
description: Break into the Archive vault, tune the prism array with Orion, and claim the Lens before Dominion security closes around you.
flavor: A relic does not show truth. It makes hiding harder.

stages.title: Archive Infiltration
stages.description: Reach the vault and open the containment field.

stages.title: Claim the Relic
stages.description: Take the Lens and survive the alarm.

title: Burn Notice
summary: Escape the Upper City after the Archive alarm exposes the crew.
description: Fight through the lockdown, defeat the Administrator on the landing pad, and use the Lens to time the Astra through the Shield toward the Foundry.
flavor: When paradise burns, it smells like cleaning chemicals.

stages.title: Escape Lockdown
stages.description: Break out of the Archive and fight to the roof.

tasks.text: Reach the landing pad under alarm.

stages.title: Slip the Shield
stages.description: Use the Lens to find the Shield gap and launch the Astra.

tasks.text: Launch the Astra toward the Foundry.

title: Corporate Espionage
summary: Steal an encrypted ledger from the Exec Lounge.
description: Lift a rival executive ledger from a private safe and turn their secrets into leverage.
flavor: The rich call it leverage when the poor call it theft.

stages.title: Private Safe
stages.description: Crack the lounge safe and take the ledger.

tasks.text: Steal the encrypted ledger from the Exec Lounge safe.

title: Prototype Testing
summary: Test a dangerous experimental weapon on Upper City drones.
description: Use a hacked lab terminal to run a weapon trial against Dominion drones and claim the Phase Rounds mod.
flavor: Quality assurance is easier when the product hates you back.

stages.title: Weapon Trial
stages.description: Run the prototype against drones in the Archive test alcove.

tasks.text: Test the experimental weapon on security drones.

title: Into the Fire
summary: Land in Sector 7 and force a route into the Foundry factory.
description: Secure the Obsidian Shelf, learn the Slag River hazards, and hack the cooling vents so the service airlock can open.
flavor: The Foundry does not guard its doors. It lets the heat do that.

stages.title: Obsidian Shelf
stages.description: Land the Astra and orient in the Foundry heat.

tasks.text: Secure the Astra on the Obsidian Shelf.
Navigate the Slag River hazard crossing.

stages.title: Cooling the Gate
stages.description: Hack the vent controls and enter the service airlock.

tasks.text: Hack the cooling vent controls at Waste Intake.

title: Ghost in the Machine
summary: Recover Gh0st's blueprint data from Project Phantom records.
description: Access the Project Phantom terminal, discover the truth about Gh0st and Elara, and regroup at the Cooling Springs before climbing deeper into the factory.
flavor: A weapon can learn the name it was denied.

stages.title: Project Phantom
stages.description: Find the records that explain Gh0st's origin.

stages.title: Breather
stages.description: Regroup at the Cooling Springs after the truth lands.

tasks.text: Regroup with Gh0st at the Cooling Springs.

title: Sabotage
summary: Destroy Dominion ammo crates staged around the Slag Pits.
description: A resistance contact marks three crates feeding the factory guns. Destroy all three before pushing inside.
flavor: Every crate that does not fire at you later is a good crate.

stages.title: Ammo Crates
stages.description: Destroy the three marked Dominion ammo crates.

tasks.text: Destroy the crate at the Slag River.
Destroy the crate at Waste Intake.
Destroy the crate at the Service Airlock.

title: Lost Worker
summary: Find a missing engineer in the lava tube maintenance paths.
description: Follow a cracked worker tablet signal into the Cooling Springs and recover the engineer's coolant rig.
flavor: In the Foundry, a missed check-in usually means the heat collected its debt.

stages.title: Tablet Signal
stages.description: Trace the missing worker signal.

tasks.text: Find the missing engineer's tablet at the Cooling Springs.

title: The Scrap Heap
summary: Salvage parts from destroyed mechs in the lava-flow debris.
description: A scrapper drone wants the good parts from three wrecked machines near Waste Intake.
flavor: The Foundry throws nothing away. It just waits for someone desperate enough to pick it up.

stages.title: Mech Wrecks
stages.description: Strip usable parts from destroyed mechs.

tasks.text: Salvage parts from three destroyed mechs.

title: The Assembly
summary: Fight through the Foundry production floor and break the Phantom fabrication line.
description: Navigate conveyor belts, survive Phantom Prototype waves, and overload the fabrication matrix feeding Gh0st's mass-production successors.
flavor: The machine of war sounds like work until it starts printing faces.

stages.title: Production Floor
stages.description: Cross the conveyor belts and survive the gauntlet.

stages.title: Overload
stages.description: Break the fabrication matrix.

title: The Anvil
summary: Reach the Forge and steal the Anvil relic.
description: Solve the conveyor-crusher puzzle, claim the Anvil, and unlock Construct after Nova's first failed attempt to shape the slag river.
flavor: Creation answers intent. Doubt becomes debris.

stages.title: Forge Access
stages.description: Open the Anvil cradle.

stages.title: Claim the Relic
stages.description: Take the Anvil and learn what Construct costs.

title: Meltdown
summary: Defeat Rylos, steal the Deep-Core Engine, and escape the Foundry.
description: Face Commander Rylos and the Titan Walker, steal the Deep-Core Engine and Phase-Cutter Arrays, then launch before Vale locks down the sector.
flavor: The Foundry built instruments for silence. You steal the noise.

stages.title: Rylos
stages.description: Confront Commander Rylos on the Titan Dock.

stages.title: Steal the Heart
stages.description: Grab the engine, arrays, and escape before meltdown.

tasks.text: Escape the Foundry aboard the Astra.

title: Quality Control
summary: Resolve the rejected defective units becoming sentient.
description: A rejected droid points you to five defective units that are waking up inside the quality-control queue. Reprogram them or shut them down cleanly.
flavor: The line calls it defect. Gh0st calls it a choice.

stages.title: Defective Units
stages.description: Choose what to do with the waking units.

tasks.text: Resolve the defective units in quality control.

title: Overclocked
summary: Survive three overclocked test chamber waves.
description: A lab terminal activates environmental hazards in the Forge test chamber. Survive the three-wave trial for a Thermal Clip mod.
flavor: The Foundry's safety protocol is a waiver it signs for you.

stages.title: Hazard Trial
stages.description: Survive the overclocked test chamber.

tasks.text: Survive three waves with environmental hazards active.

title: Docking Procedure
summary: Fight through Orbital Compliance and force the Astra onto the Ring.
description: Survive the fighter screen, force a dock at the Executive Spire, and let Gh0st break the airlock.
flavor: The Halo does not welcome visitors. It processes them.

stages.title: The Halo
stages.description: Reach the Ring through the Compliance screen.

stages.title: Forced Docking
stages.description: Take control of the Executive Dock.

tasks.text: Force dock on the Executive Spire.

title: Zero G
summary: Cross the Ring and uncover the truth behind Project Harmony.
description: Move through the Solarium, break the Security Hub, descend the zero-gravity service shaft, and access the Server Farm.
flavor: Paradise above. A cage below. Silence everywhere.

stages.title: False Paradise
stages.description: Cross the executive decks and reach the core lift.

stages.title: Zero G
stages.description: Descend past the Hunter-Killer patrols.

title: Employee of the Month
summary: Read the Director's personal logs.
description: Open Thorne's private archive and learn how Dominion executives think.
flavor: Every empire keeps minutes.

stages.title: Private Archive
stages.description: Read the Director's logs.

title: Solar Maintenance
summary: Realign the Solarium mirrors and burn away void-moss.
description: Help the maintenance bot recover the fusion lamp mirrors from invasive void-moss.
flavor: Even a false sun needs someone to clean it.

stages.title: Mirror Array
stages.description: Restore the Solarium mirror array.

title: Vacuum Seal
summary: Seal three hull breaches before the dock loses pressure.
description: Use the Executive Dock pressure console to isolate three ruptured compartments.
flavor: Space is patient. Seals are not.

stages.title: Pressure Loss
stages.description: Seal the damaged hull sections.

title: The Core Approach
summary: Breach the Deep Ring firewall and reach the inner sanctum.
description: Navigate the Server Farm, hack three firewall nodes, and destroy the hard-light construct guarding the Anchor Chamber.
flavor: The cold is deliberate. So is the maze.

stages.title: Firewall Maze
stages.description: Find and disable the three firewall nodes.

stages.title: Hard-Light Guardian
stages.description: Defeat the Firewall Construct.

title: The Anchor
summary: Find Elara and recover the relic at the heart of the Ring.
description: Enter the Anchor Chamber, reunite Gh0st with Elara, and take the Anchor before Vale rewrites the root system.
flavor: A person is not a key, a battery, or a weapon blueprint.

stages.title: The Living CPU
stages.description: Reach Elara inside the Anchor Chamber.

tasks.text: Find Elara wired into the Ring.

stages.title: The Anchor
stages.description: Take the relic and escape the chamber.

title: Critical Mass
summary: Survive Vale's coup and escape the collapsing Ring through the Tear.
description: Reach the Throne Room, witness the Soloist, defeat the Compliance Avatar, and follow Vale beyond reality.
flavor: One voice is not peace. It is the end of everyone else.

stages.title: The Soloist
stages.description: Confront Vale in the Throne Room.

tasks.text: Confront Vale and witness the Soloist.

stages.title: Critical Mass
stages.description: Break the Avatar and reach the Tear.

title: Ghost in the Shell
summary: Recover backup data from a purged server rack.
description: Extract the last intact defensive routines from a server Vale ordered erased.
flavor: Deleted is not the same as gone.

stages.title: Purged Rack
stages.description: Recover the defensive backup.

title: Admin Privileges
summary: Use a dead administrator's keycard to open the executive armory.
description: Recover the keycard in the Server Farm and carry it to the Throne Room armory.
flavor: Privilege survives its owner.

stages.title: Administrator Key
stages.description: Find the executive armory credential.

stages.title: Executive Armory
stages.description: Open the armory.

title: Fractured Minds
summary: Rescue the crew from three nightmares and reassemble the Starborn.
description: Break Zeke's infinite office, Gh0st's endless war, and Orion's silent shore before the Source makes those fears permanent.
flavor: Reality is subjective here. So is the way out.

stages.title: Three Nightmares
stages.description: Find each missing member of the crew.

tasks.text: Rescue Zeke from the Infinite Cubicle.
Rescue Gh0st from the Endless War.
Rescue Orion from the Silent Shore.

stages.title: The Key
stages.description: Return to the Campfire and reassemble the crew.

tasks.text: Reassemble the team at the Campfire.

title: The Echo of the Mines
summary: Cross the distorted beginning of Nova's journey.
description: Navigate the memory of the colony, avoid the Manager projections, and reach the elevator out of the loop.
flavor: The beginning remembers you differently.

stages.title: The Beginning
stages.description: Find a route through the distorted colony.

tasks.text: Enter the Echo of the Mines.

title: The Crossing
summary: Build a bridge from memory and reach the final ascent.
description: Let the crew's memories stabilize a path across the static, then cross into the Singularity together.
flavor: No one crosses alone.

stages.title: Bridge of Memories
stages.description: Build and cross the bridge.

tasks.text: Build the bridge from shared memories.
Share one final moment with the crew.

title: Jed's Echo
summary: Speak with Jed's memory at his old workbench.
description: Return to the workbench where Nova learned what survival was supposed to protect.
flavor: A memory cannot answer, but it can remind.

stages.title: Old Workbench
stages.description: Talk to Jed's echo.

title: The HR Record
summary: Let Zeke delete the employee file that still defines him.
description: Find Zeke's Dominion record inside the Infinite Cubicle and erase its authority over him.
flavor: Employment status is not identity.

stages.title: Personnel File
stages.description: Delete Zeke's record.

title: Elara's Song
summary: Recover a pure recording of Elara's voice.
description: Separate Elara's original song from the command layers built over Gh0st's memories.
flavor: Before she was a key, she was a voice.

stages.title: Clean Signal
stages.description: Recover Elara's song.

title: The Spire of Thought
summary: Climb the memory spiral and defeat the Source shadows guarding the Center.
description: Cross debris from every world, survive the shadow wave, and break the Memory Leak and Nightmare Guard at the top.
flavor: The universe keeps every version you almost became.

stages.title: Memory Stair
stages.description: Climb through fragments of the journey.

stages.title: Spire of Thought
stages.description: Break the final memory defenses.

tasks.text: Defeat the Memory Leak and Nightmare Guard.

title: The Final Note
summary: Defeat the Ascended and tune the world.
description: Confront Vale, survive his god-form, and use the Key to form the Starborn circuit before the Great Silence consumes every voice.
flavor: Not fate. Not one voice. A choice made together.

stages.title: The Soloist
stages.description: Defeat Vale's human form.

stages.title: The Singularity
stages.description: Defeat the Ascended god-form.

stages.title: Tune the World
stages.description: Use the Key and complete the circuit.

title: The Aethel Grave
summary: Find the first Architects' burial ground in the Source.
description: Help Orion identify the resonance where the first Aethel surrendered their bodies to the current.
flavor: A grave is also proof that someone was here.

stages.title: First Architects
stages.description: Find the Aethel burial ground.

title: The Final Scavenge
summary: Recover a piece of the Astra from an impossible future.
description: A Scrapper Memory has located a future fragment of the crew's ship inside the Spire of Thought.
flavor: Nothing is junk if it got you home.

stages.title: Future Wreckage
